{# Adapted from: - djangoproject.com/djangoproject/templates/base.html - sphinx/themes/basic/layout.html #} {%- block doctype -%} {%- endblock doctype %} {%- macro script() %} {%- for js in script_files %} {{ js_tag(js) }} {%- endfor %} {%- endmacro %} {%- macro css() %} {# Strip Sphinx's copy of pygments.css. It conflicts with our own copy (which is bundled in output.css). #} {%- for css in css_files if "pygments.css" not in css.filename %} {{ css_tag(css) }} {%- endfor %} {%- endmacro %} {%- if html_tag %} {{ html_tag }} {%- else %} {%- endif %} {{- metatags }} {%- block htmltitle %} {{ title|striptags|e }}{{ titlesuffix }} {%- endblock htmltitle %} {%- block css %} {{- css() }} {%- endblock css %} {%- block scripts %} {{- script() }} {%- endblock scripts %} {%- if favicon_url %} {%- endif %} {%- block extrahead %}{% endblock %} {%- block body_tag %}{% endblock %} {% block before_header %}{% endblock %} Skip to main content {%- block header %} {# Adapted from djangoproject.com/djangoproject/templates/includes/header.html #}
Django
{%- include "searchbox.html" %} {%- include "toggle_theme.html" %}
{# End of djangoproject.com header.html #}
{% block header_title %}{# "block header" on djangoproject.com #}{% endblock %}
{%- endblock header %}
{% block content %}{% endblock %} Back to Top
{% block content_related %}{% endblock %} {% block content_extra %}{% endblock %}
{%- block footer %} {# Adapted from djangoproject.com/djangoproject/templates/includes/footer.html #}
{%- if last_updated %}
{% trans last_updated=last_updated|e %}Last updated on {{ last_updated }}.{% endtrans %}
{%- endif %} {%- if show_sphinx %}
{% trans sphinx_version=sphinx_version|e %}Created using Sphinx {{ sphinx_version }}.{% endtrans %}
{%- endif %}

{%- if show_copyright %}
© {{ copyright }}.
{% endif %}

{# End of djangoproject.com footer.html #} {%- endblock footer %}
